story: Canelo vs. Mbilli gets new official date in October in Riyadh
title: Canelo's Riyadh Rendezvous Shifted: What's Next?
script:
Canelo is suing his opponent for refusing to step in the ring. 

The highly anticipated rematch between Canelo Alvarez and Demircan Mbilli is set. It will now take place in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia this October. This major shift in plans is just the latest development in the boxing world. Earlier today, Anthony Joshua successfully defended his title against Prenga. However, controversy is brewing in the ring, with Jai Opetaia suing the IBF for allegedly conspiring against him. Meanwhile, Errol Spence Jr. is set to face off against Tim Tszyu in a highly anticipated showdown. Can Canelo's new strategy be enough to secure victory against Mbilli, or will the young challenger dethrone the legend?
